Tian Fen з”°иҠ¬
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tian Fen (з”°иҠ¬). Accompanied Emperor Xian during his flight away from Li Jue, killed in battle. Tian Fen was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Tian Fen lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
